description: hyoscyamine appears in records as a compound reported in nan. Current source coverage is limited and still developing.
summary: hyoscyamine appears in records as a compound reported in nan. Current source coverage is limited and still developing.
mechanism: Scopolamine, hyoscyamine, and atropine block muscarinic acetylcholine receptors (anticholinergic), disrupting sensory and cognitive processing.
